title: Political Vocabulary
description: Civic and political terms: polarization, populism, constitutional norms, checks and balances.
summary_pt_br: Vocabulário político: polarização, populismo, autoritarismo, erosão democrática, normas, freios e contrapesos.

scenes.subtitle_en: Civic and political terms: polarization, populism, constitutional norms, checks and balances.
scenes.subtitle_pt: Vocabulário político: polarização, populismo, autoritarismo, erosão democrática, normas, freios e contrapesos.

scenes.text_en: Civic and political terms: polarization, populism, constitutional norms, checks and balances. Focus: political vocabulary. Polarization corrodes the civic norms democracies depend on.
scenes.text_pt: Vocabulário político: polarização, populismo, autoritarismo, erosão democrática, normas, freios e contrapesos. Foco: political vocabulary. A polarização corrói as normas cívicas.

scenes.title: Political Vocabulary
scenes.body_en: Terms: POLARIZATION, POPULISM, AUTHORITARIANISM, DEMOCRATIC BACKSLIDING, NORMS, CHECKS AND BALANCES, CIVIC PARTICIPATION, GERRYMANDERING.
scenes.body_pt: Vocabulário político: polarização, populismo, autoritarismo, erosão democrática, normas, freios e contrapesos.

examples.en: Polarization corrodes the civic norms democracies depend on.
examples.pt: A polarização corrói as normas cívicas.

examples.en: Checks and balances are not self-executing; citizens enforce them.
examples.pt: Freios e contrapesos não se autoaplicam — cidadãos os aplicam.

examples.en: Democratic backsliding often begins with normalized rule-breaking.
examples.pt: A erosão democrática começa com a normalização de quebra de regras.

exercise.question: Complete: "___ corrodes the civic norms democracies depend on."
exercise.explanation: Full sentence: "Polarization corrodes the civic norms democracies depend on."
exercise.hint_pt_br: A polarização corrói as normas cívicas.

exercise.question: Which sentence is correct?
options: Checks and balances are not self-executing; citizens enforce them.
I haven't heard anything about that.
exercise.explanation: Correct: "Checks and balances are not self-executing; citizens enforce them."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Freios e contrapesos não se autoaplicam — cidadãos os aplicam.

exercise.explanation: Key terms from the lesson — match each to its meaning.

scenes.title: Political Vocabulary — dialog
scenes.pt_summary: Diálogo sobre political vocabulary. Pratique as frases marcadas.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: When opposing sides stop sharing basic facts.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Why do norms matter more than laws sometimes?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Laws depend on norms being honored first.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Political English is the grammar of civic literacy.

scenes.title: The civics lecture
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que entendeu — resumo, análise, e sua opinião crítica. O professor avaliará.
scenes.prompt_en: Summarize three political concepts. Use at least three political terms.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que ouviu. Análise crítica com quem falou, argumentos, e sua reflexão.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: At the public lecture series, Kumar presented the vocabulary that citizens most urgently need to understand today.

paragraphs.speaker: Kumar
paragraphs.en: Polarization corrodes the civic norms that democracies silently depend on to function across every election cycle.

paragraphs.speaker: Audience
paragraphs.en: And populism uses the language of 'the people' to delegitimize the very institutions that protect the people.

paragraphs.speaker: Kumar
paragraphs.en: Democratic backsliding frequently begins with small, normalized rule-breaking — not with sudden coups or revolutions.

paragraphs.speaker: Audience
paragraphs.en: Checks and balances are never self-executing — they rely on citizens demanding that norms be honored actively.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: Political literacy, Kumar argued, is the quiet prerequisite of any functioning democracy — and the first casualty of silence.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the advanced class just finished "Political Vocabulary". Civic and political terms: polarization, populism, constitutional norms, checks and balances. Polarization corrodes the civic norms democracies depend on. Checks and balances are not self-executing; citizens enforce them. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that at this level, reading widely and writing daily are non-negotiable.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is non-negotiable at this level?
check.explanation: At C-level, wide reading and daily writing are essential.
check.hint_pt_br: Leitura ampla e escrita diária são essenciais no C.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in advanced class we studied "Political Vocabulary". It was demanding but genuinely rewarding. See you next session!

scenes.title: Go deeper — advanced resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes avançadas pra aprofundar. Leitura regular é o que separa um aluno avançado de um proficiente.
